basic_details.job_title: Anna University – System Administrator / Office Assistant – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of System Administrator / Office Assistant. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Anna University official website annauniv.edu.

qualification.education_qualification: System Administrator: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Artificial Intelligence & Data Science or related disciplines. For Office Assistant: Minimum qualification: Pass in 8th Standard.

salary_details.pay_scale: System Administrator: Rs. 40,000/- per month (Consolidated), Office Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Anna University System Administrator / Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
